task_completion.description: Verify the ground station 'Purdue_Lab' is created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station configuration window or list showing the name 'Purdue_Lab' with Latitude 40.4259 (or 40.4259 N), Longitude -86.9081 (or 86.9081 W), and Altitude 187m.

task_completion.description: Verify a tracking module named 'Orbit_Types' is created and uses the 'Purdue_Lab' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module configuration screen or a module window titled 'Orbit_Types' that explicitly shows 'Purdue_Lab' selected as its ground station (QTH).

task_completion.description: Verify ISS (ZARYA) [25544] is added to the module and colored red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for ISS (ZARYA) or NORAD 25544 in the module's satellite list, configuration window, or on the map, with its track, footprint, or marker explicitly colored red.

task_completion.description: Verify NOAA 19 [33591] is added to the module and colored blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for NOAA 19 or NORAD 33591 in the module's satellite list, configuration window, or on the map, with its track, footprint, or marker explicitly colored blue.

task_completion.description: Verify the third satellite (GOES 16 or NORAD 43013) is added to the module and colored green.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for GOES 16, NORAD 43013, NOAA 20, or JPSS-1 in the module's satellite list, configuration window, or on the map, with its track, footprint, or marker explicitly colored green.

task_completion.description: Verify the module display is set to a split-view layout showing both Map and Polar (radar) views.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main 'Orbit_Types' module window displaying both a 2D world map and a circular polar/radar view simultaneously (Layout 4 in GPredict).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict graphical user interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with GPredict dialog boxes (e.g., Edit Ground Station, Configure Module) rather than terminal commands or text file editing.

integrity.description: Verify the final layout is rendered by the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map and polar views should be actively rendering satellite positions and footprints within the GPredict application window, not static mockups.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply write the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows the GPredict application interface, not a text editor (like gedit or nano) with the prompt's text pasted in.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Ground Station: 'Purdue_Lab' at 40.4259 N, 86.9081 W (-86.9081), 187m altitude. Target Module: 'Orbit_Types'. Expected Layout: Split-view with Map and Polar (radar) views (Layout 4 in GPredict). Note on Satellites: The prompt asks for GOES 16 [NORAD 43013]. However, NORAD 43013 is actually NOAA 20 (JPSS-1). Accept either GOES 16 (41866) or NORAD 43013 (which may display as NOAA 20 / JPSS-1) as correct for the third satellite, as long as it is colored green. ISS (ZARYA) [25544] must be red, and NOAA 19 [33591] must be blue.
